creator: brian@awfulhak.org
text:
> >Number:         7660
> >Category:       bin
> >Synopsis:       ppp makes hangup after good dial & login by "Interrupted system call"
[.....]

Please submit some relevant logs.  Check out

  http://www.FreeBSD.org/FAQ/userppp.html

for some hints on how to generate some useful information.

Also, be careful.  It's likely that the ``Interrupted system call'' 
is an error resulting from a decreased ``redial'' timeout forcing ppp 
to attempt to re-open the port too quickly after failure and blocking 
for more than 1/10th of a second.  It is very unlikely that this has 
anything to do with the actual problem... the log files should reveal 
this.
-- 
Brian <brian@Awfulhak.org>, <brian@FreeBSD.org>, <brian@OpenBSD.org>
      <http://www.Awfulhak.org>
Don't _EVER_ lose your sense of humour....
